name: @poo-flow/runtime-wasm
description: Browser WebAssembly runtime for canonical POO Flow Bundle v1 topologies

scripts.generate: mkdir -p workflows && env POO_FLOW_HUMAN_CAPABILITY_DESCRIPTOR_OUT=workflows/human-capability.descriptor.bin POO_FLOW_HUMAN_CAPABILITY_ARENA_OUT=workflows/human-capability.arena.bin GERBIL_PATH=../../.gerbil gxi examples/human-capability.ss
scripts.build:wasm: mkdir -p dist && emcc -O2 -std=c11 -I../runtime-c/include -I../runtime-c/bundle-v1/include -Iinclude src/runtime_wasm_shim.c src/workflow_cursor.c ../runtime-c/src/runtime_v0.c ../runtime-c/bundle-v1/src/bundle_v1.c -o dist/poo_flow_runtime.wasm -sSTANDALONE_WASM=1 -Wl,--no-entry -sERROR_ON_UNDEFINED_SYMBOLS=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=@exports.json && cp src/index.mjs dist/index.mjs && cp src/index.d.ts dist/index.d.ts
scripts.build: npm run generate && npm run build:wasm
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:generate-determinism && wasm-opt -O --enable-bulk-memory-opt dist/poo_flow_runtime.wasm -o /dev/null && node --test test/*.test.mjs
